packageRules.description: reqwest is pinned to 0.12 by tauri-plugin-http — don't propose 0.13+
Major bumps to the Tauri stack need manual approval (they move together)

Pin tauri-action to v0: v1 emits api.github.com asset URLs in latest.json, which the unauthenticated updater can't fetch cleanly (verified on a throwaway tag). v0 emits plain github.com/.../releases/download/ URLs. Revisit only if v1's URL format is confirmed updater-compatible.
